title: ferray-window: vectorize only works on Ix1 — not generic over dimension
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

vectorize() in functional.rs returns 'impl Fn(&Array<T, Ix1>) -> FerrayResult<Array<U, Ix1>>' — hardcoded to 1D. vectorize_nd exists as a separate function for ND arrays. NumPy's vectorize works on any shape. The two should be unified — vectorize should be generic over D: Dimension, not split into two functions.
